query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS config_baseline_rules (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  baseline_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  rule_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  benchmark VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  section VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  cbr_severity ENUM('critical','high','medium','low') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  cbr_platform VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  expected_value TEXT,
  remediation_guidance TEXT,
  ksi_ids JSON,
  mitre_ids JSON,
  enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  cbr_created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

  baseline_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,

  title VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,

  remediation_guidance TEXT,
  ksi_ids JSON,
  mitre_ids JSON,
  enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  cbr_created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
